# custom_resource (Resource)

A custom resource that can be used to interact with custom scripts. See the provider documentation for details how to implement a custom script.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "custom_resource" "example" {
  type = "example"
  input = {
    "key" = "value"
  }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `input` (Dynamic) The input for the custom resource. This is a map of strings to anything.
- `name` (String) The name of the script. This must match with the `name` attribute in the script.

### Read-Only

- `state` (Dynamic) The state of the custom resource. This is a map of strings to anything.
